Update to Transaction and Charge Codes, Form 3667

https://payments.central1.com/news_updates/new-transactions-code-combinations-implemented/

Transaction and Charge Codes
3667
We added new codes for primary cheques clearing (PC), charge back qualified clearing (CQ), and e-Transfer request money debit (E3).
